summary: Predictions completeness validation feature tested: Backend API returns 422 (PREDICTIONS_INCOMPLETE) when not all unlocked matches have predictions. Frontend correctly shows disabled 'Completa tutti i pronostici' button with 0/3 progress bar, and enables 'Salva Pronostici' button with 3/3 green progress bar when all predictions are complete.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: predictions.tsx handleSave (lines 264-295) validates completeness before saving - shows Alert if completedCount < editableCount
VERIFIED: predictions.tsx footer (lines 632-680) shows progress bar only in OPEN state, with editableCount/completedEditableCount/allComplete logic
VERIFIED: button disabled prop: `disabled={saving || (isOpen && !allComplete)}` - correctly disables when incomplete
VERIFIED: button title: when complete or non-OPEN => t('save_predictions') = 'Salva Pronostici'; when incomplete => 'Completa tutti i pronostici'
NOTE: Feature request mentioned button text 'Conferma pronostici' but implementation uses t('save_predictions') = 'Salva Pronostici' - semantically equivalent, consistent with existing i18n

VERIFIED: server.py save_predictions (lines 1652-1693) validates completeness pre-save: checks existing + incoming predictions cover all unlocked matches, returns 422 with PREDICTIONS_INCOMPLETE code if missing any
VERIFIED: 422 response structure: {code: 'PREDICTIONS_INCOMPLETE', message: '...', completed: N, required: N}
VERIFIED: Cumulative logic works: existing predictions + incoming predictions together cover all matches => 200 success
VERIFIED: Progress bar fill width: 0% (amber) when incomplete, 100% (green) when complete
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI_GiornataAperta matchday (number=5, OPEN) with 3 future matches (start_time 2030) for frontend UI testing. Cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Predictions completeness validation fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/predictions/{matchday_id} returns 422 PREDICTIONS_INCOMPLETE when missing any unlocked match prediction (cumulative: existing DB preds + incoming payload must cover all unlocked matches). Frontend: disabled 'Completa tutti i pronostici' button with 0/N progress bar when incomplete, green 100% progress bar + active 'Salva Pronostici' button when all N matches have predictions. The league ilio@raimondi.it (ID: 1762173a-31fe-463b-9668-d757114f440b) has 4 COMPLETED matchdays after cleanup.

backend_cumulative_logic.note: Existing DB predictions + new payload together cover all matches => 200

frontend_button_disabled.text: Completa tutti i pronostici (with alert-circle icon)

frontend_progress_bar.evidence: 0/3 partite (amber 0% fill) when empty, 3/3 partite (green 100% fill) when complete

frontend_button_enabled_complete.evidence: aria-disabled=null, pointer-events='auto', text='Salva Pronostici' when all 3 predictions saved
